name: source_search
description: Search source chunks using hybrid semantic+sparse retrieval (BM25 + MiniLM dense + RRF fusion). Use for conceptual questions.

query.description: The search query — a conceptual question or topic description.

source_ids.description: Mandatory list of source IDs to search within. Omitting is a TypeError.

mode.description: Retrieval mode. Default hybrid uses BM25 sparse + MiniLM dense + RRF fusion.
